name: typed-wasm-mcp
description: AffineScript typed-wasm gateway. Compiles .affine source to Wasm with the typed-wasm Level 7/10 ownership contract, runs the intra-module verifier, and runs the cross-module boundary verifier between two compiled modules.

tools.name: typed_wasm_validate_module
tools.description: Compile a .affine source and run the intra-module typed-wasm Level 7/10 verifier (Tw_verify) against the emitted Wasm. Returns valid=true when every [own] param is consumed exactly once on every path and every [mut] param is exclusively held; otherwise valid=false with a per-violation report.

tools.name: typed_wasm_check_types
tools.description: Run the AffineScript type checker on a .affine source. Reports type errors without emitting Wasm or running the ownership verifier.

tools.name: typed_wasm_compile_module
tools.description: Compile a .affine source to Wasm. The emitted module carries the [affinescript.ownership] custom section that downstream typed-wasm verifiers consume.

output_path.description: Optional path for the .wasm output. Defaults to <module_path with .wasm extension>.

tools.name: typed_wasm_verify_boundary
tools.description: Run the cross-module typed-wasm Level 10 boundary verifier on a callee/caller pair. Compiles both .affine sources, extracts the callee's ownership-annotated export interface, and checks that every local function in the caller invokes each Linear-param import exactly once per execution path. Returns clean=true on success; otherwise clean=false with the boundary violations.

callee_path.description: Path to the .affine source for the exporter (whose pub fns define the contract)

caller_path.description: Path to the .affine source for the importer (whose function bodies are checked against the callee's contract)
